decisions.description: Checks if a measure type was selected in the previous screen.
decisions.name: Was_a_measure_type_selected
decisions.label: Was a measure type selected?

Flow.description: Screen flow allows PSO's to Approve/Reject any custom measure spends that have been submitted with a Batch.

dynamicChoiceSets.description: All the current Property Measure Types that are "Active".
dynamicChoiceSets.name: ActivePropertyMeasureTypes

Flow.label: ABS - Custom Measure Spends

recordCreates.description: Creates a new measure type record and links it to the measure spend record.
recordCreates.name: Create_Measure_Type_Record
recordCreates.label: Create Measure Type Record

recordCreates.description: Creates a new measure type record and links it to the measure spend record.
recordCreates.name: Create_Reject_Measure_Type_Record
recordCreates.label: Create Reject Measure Type Record

recordLookups.description: Gets all the "Active" or "Custom Approved" Property Measure Types.
recordLookups.name: Get_Active_or_Custom_Approved_Property_Measure_Types
recordLookups.label: Get "Active" or "Custom Approved" Property Measure Types

recordLookups.description: Gets all custom measure spends related to the Batch record that have a "Status" of "Requested".
recordLookups.name: Get_Custom_Measure_Spends
recordLookups.label: Get Custom Measure Spends

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Batch Measure Spend record with the Measure Type record that was create in the previous node.
recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_Update_Batch_Measure_Spend
recordUpdates.label: Update Batch Measure Spend

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Batch Measure Spend record with the Measure Type record that was selected in the previous screen.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Batch_Measure_Spend
recordUpdates.label: Update Batch Measure Spend

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_noselectionofmeasuretype
fields.fieldText: Thank you, the selected measure spend record has been updated with the measure type you created. Please click "Next" to continue reviewing any remaining measure spends.

fields.name: FlowFail
fields.fieldText:
An unhandled fault has occurred in this flow.


Please contact your Salesforce Administrator for assistance.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_noselectionofmeasuretype
fields.fieldText: Thank you, the selected measure spend record has been updated with the measure type you selected. Please click "Next" to continue reviewing any remaining measure spends.

fields.name: nocustommeasurespends
fields.fieldText: There are no custom measure spends to review for this batch.

fields.name: rejecttext
fields.fieldText: Thank you, the selected measure spend record has been rejected and the Grant Recipient notified.

fields.name: Would_you_like_to_approve_or_reject_this_measure1
fields.fieldText: Would you like to approve or reject this measure?

fields.name: noselectionofmeasuretype
fields.fieldText: If none of the measure types below are a match. please click "Next" to create a new measure type record, and have it linked to the previously selected measure spend record.
